title: The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Killer Grain Bait Sachet - 25g x 6 Kills Mice Pre-Measured Chew Through Sachet Difenacoum, Blue
features: BAIT STATION REQUIRED: Use The Big Cheese Rat and Mouse Bait Station (sold separately) By law, these sachets must be used in a tamper-resistant bait station
EASY-TO-USE: Six grain bait sachets are pre-measured and wrapped, no bait handling required
EFFECTIVE: Rats and mice chew through the sachets to get to the bait
HIGHLY PALATABLE BAIT: No spill rodent killer bait maximises bait take to ensure a lethal dose to rats and mice
VERSATILE USE: Poison grain bait can be used indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings such as garden sheds, outbuildings, garages or greenhouses

Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
